jsonLd.title: Zappfresh is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
